---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve? What does the current experience look like?

## Proposed solution

Describe the feature or change you'd like to see.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative approaches you've thought about and why you didn't pick them.

## Additional context

Mockups, links to similar features in other apps, or anything else that clarifies the request.
